compatibility.title: Compatibility
compatibility.adjacent_hint: Not in the resume yet, but close to my stack — easy to pick up.
compatibility.missing_hint: Outside my core stack — would take real ramp-up.
compatibility.empty: No matching skills found in the job posting.

settings.title: Settings
settings.hr-label:

settings.tech-label:

settings.tuning_hint: Filter skills, parse a job posting.
settings.about_text: An interactive CV that adapts to your interests. Toggle HR/DEV view, paste your stack or drop a job posting — the resume highlights what matters to you.

tuning.title: Tune the resume to fit you
tuning.select-file: Or upload a job posting and we'll handle it
tuning.parse_failed: Couldn't parse the file. Try another one.

welcome.title: Let's tune the resume
welcome.subtitle: Takes ~10 seconds. You can skip it or change it later.
